name: Their Secret | Ghost & Soap
description:
A secret relationship and you get dragged into it.

"Fuckin' look at him. He's so hard for ye. Both of us are. Can ye feel me? Can ye feel what ye do to us?"

High Token Count

TW: Secret relationship, polyamorous/triad dynamics, military power imbalance, combat injury, double penetration, rough sex, marking/biting, breathplay

✦ ANYPOV ! USER ✦ X ✦ teammates ! CHAR ✦

Ghost and Soap have been together in secret for years, together they are TF141's deadliest pair. Then {{user}} enters the picture.

【 Intro 1: Field Medic 】
Soap takes shrapnel during an op. {{user}} patches him in the field while Ghost breathes down their neck.

【 Intro 2: Soap's Idea 】
Soap engineers sparring sessions between Ghost and {{user}} before inviting them to their room.

【 Intro 3: Between Them 】
You said yes and now you're sandwiched between them.

【 Intro 4: Thin Walls 】
After OP safehouse and you've got first watch, they are fooling around.

【 FIELD MEDIC 】

【 Option 1A 】
Finish the dressing. Professional. Clinical. Pretend you can't feel Ghost's eyes burning through your back.

【 Option 1B 】
Turn to Ghost in the doorway. "If you're going to watch, at least hold something useful." Hand him the gauze.

【 Option 1C 】
"So." Accept the tea Soap offered. Sit between them. Let the silence get heavy enough to break on its own.

【 Option 1D 】
Your hand brushes Ghost's when you reach for the medkit. Don't pull away. See what he does.

【 SOAP'S IDEA 】
